note: Legal Freelance pipeline scrape, 7-day window. 7 new leads scoring 55+ after dedup against daily-, pr-freelance-, and legal-freelance-scrape reports back to 2026-04-30. Two Grade-A interim-counsel postings (MLA Tech Transactions, Etsy via The Mom Project) sit at the top because they pair clean ICP practice areas (securities + tech transactions) with explicit interim-engagement-model and credible comp signals. Two Grade-A fractional-GC operating-company roles (Neuroscale AI, Montway Auto Transport) round out the As — Montway has a published $150/hr rate, which is a strong intent signal. Three Grade-B leads (MLA Corp+Securities, LWD Advisors fractional, Roasa Law Group transactional) round out the slate. Excluded: Socket Fractional GC (prior 2026-05-15 note flagged this as stale/off-ICP, still applies); all Latitude Legal postings (#5073, #5075, #5076, #5077, #5064, plus PT M&A and contract L&E) captured in earlier reports; Ontra freelance network (5/15); Arootah, AngelList, BlackRock, Robert Half, Lawtrades, Axiom, Paragon, MLA Interim Legal Talent generic (all captured earlier). Stealth-Startup-via-FractionalJobs.io was excluded — confidential employer is hard to qualify without revealing terms, defer until named buyer surfaces.

contacts.name: Major, Lindsey & Africa — Interim Legal Talent Recruiting
contacts.title: Interim Legal Talent — Technology Transactions desk

leads.source: MLA via LinkedIn / mlaglobal.com — Legal Freelance Scrape 2026-05-18
leads.notes: Combined 85 / Grade A. Single best lead in this scrape. MLA's Interim Legal Talent group is the industry-standard front door for high-judgment interim in-house work; this specific role (Senior Counsel, Technology Transactions, 3+ months FT, 100% remote, national) is the cleanest match for Katie's positioning in the commercial-contracts subvertical and would put her on MLA's roster for follow-on fund/PE placements. Pitch angle: lead with negotiated-volume of commercial/technology agreements (MSAs, licenses, SaaS, vendor paper) plus the ability to run a contract pipeline on a playbook, and explicitly raise capacity for fund formation / private funds / corporate-governance interim work to plant the flag for the next placement. Application path: submit through MLA's interim portal and request a routing conversation with the Tech Transactions desk; warm path is LinkedIn outreach to an MLA Interim Legal Talent director.

contacts.title: Talent / Recruiter — Interim Securities Counsel placement (Etsy)

leads.source: The Mom Project — Legal Freelance Scrape 2026-05-18
leads.notes: Combined 90 / Grade A — highest-scoring lead in this scrape. Named, brand-name public-company buyer (Etsy), explicit interim-securities-counsel engagement, remote with EST alignment, and the practice area lands directly in the securities subvertical. Pitch angle: emphasize comfort with the full SEC reporting cadence (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, proxy, S-8, Section 16), Section 13/16 ownership reporting, and disclosure judgment on material events; flag fund / private-funds securities experience as a differentiator for future placements. TMP placements are W2 and time-boxed, so this would be a clean interim engagement that also seeds the TMP recruiter relationship for follow-on contract counsel work. Application path: apply via TMP project link and request a screening call with the listed talent contact.

leads.employmentTypeRaw: Fractional General Counsel [Remote] — Neuroscale AI careers req #35692
leads.source: Neuroscale AI careers — Legal Freelance Scrape 2026-05-18
leads.notes: Combined 80 / Grade A. Direct operating-company buyer (no staffing intermediary), explicit fractional GC, fully remote, and a buyer profile (early-stage AI startup) where playbook-driven legal infrastructure compounds quickly. AI governance is currently a premium specialization (15-25% comp lift per the 2026 legal recruitment trend reports) — even if Katie does not market herself as an AI-governance specialist, the willingness to own commercial AI customer contracts, vendor paper, and SAFE/priced-round financing support is the right pitch. Pitch angle: a senior fractional GC who can install MSAs, DPAs, and an AI-vendor diligence playbook fast, run financing rounds, and handle governance — confirm hours, comp structure, and conflicts (any current AI investor relationships) up front. Apply via the company careers portal and offer a 30-minute scoping call.

leads.name: Montway Auto Transport — Fractional General Counsel (Remote, ~20 hrs/wk, $150/hr)
leads.industry: Logistics / Auto Transport — mid-market operating company

fitDetails.practice_area: general counsel scope — commercial contracts (carrier/customer paper), corporate governance, employment, regulatory; squarely in commercial-contracts subvertical
fitDetails.seniority: Fractional GC — primary legal advisor mandate
fitDetails.comp_credible: explicit $150/hr rate published — strongest possible comp_credible signal; +10
fitDetails.fund_focus: none — operating-company logistics work, off-ICP on industry

intentDetails.recency: Fractional Jobs posting (active as of May 2026)

leads.employmentTypeRaw: Fractional General Counsel — ~20 hrs/week, remote, $150/hr (Fractional Jobs)
leads.notes: Combined 80 / Grade A. Strong intent: published hourly rate ($150/hr), defined hours (~20/week), and a direct operating-company buyer — exactly the engagement shape Katie is optimizing for. Off-ICP on industry (logistics) and no fund work, which caps fit at 30. Pitch angle: lead with throughput on commercial paper (carrier/customer/vendor agreements), regulatory comfort on DOT/FMCSA-style transport rules, and the ability to install a contract workflow that lets the in-house team operate without a full-time GC. Confirm engagement structure (1099 vs. W2), conflicts, and whether the 20-hr scope flexes seasonally. The published rate is at the lower end of senior-fractional-GC market ($150-$300/hr) — useful as a floor reference, not a ceiling; if scope expands beyond 20 hrs/week, renegotiate.

leads.employmentTypeRaw: Senior Legal Counsel — ~15 hrs/week, remote (Fractional Jobs marketplace)
leads.notes: Combined 70 / Grade B. Defined fractional scope (15 hrs/week, fully remote) and a direct operating-company buyer — the engagement shape is right, but the scope and industry are off-ICP enough that fit is capped at 20. The advisory-firm category is worth probing: some advisory shops are emerging-manager-adjacent (incubators, fund-of-fund advisors, family-office GPs) and that work would map directly to ICP. Pitch angle: ask in the first conversation whether the firm advises any fund managers or runs any pooled vehicles; if yes, lead with fund-formation/governance expertise. If no, position as a senior fractional counsel who can run contract workflow plus governance on a tight 15-hr cadence. Apply via the Fractional Jobs marketplace; confirm comp range early.

leads.notes: Combined 70 / Grade B. The engagement shape (part-time, contract, remote, transactional, in M&A subvertical) is right, but this is a law-firm overflow seat rather than a direct in-house buyer, which caps fit at 25. Pitch angle: position as senior transactional support who can take M&A deals end-to-end with minimal supervision — diligence, transaction docs, closing — and offer a productized weekly hours block. Confirm rate and conflicts early; small-firm contract attorney engagements often have rate ceilings well below in-house fractional rates. Useful as a steady supplement to the fund/GC pipeline, not a hero engagement. Indeed listing — confirm the live posting URL on application and update CRM.
